name: sparql-d1
description: A Comunica-compatible RDF/JS source backed by Cloudflare D1.

scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage && npm run build && npm run worker:check && npm run pack:check && npm run licenses:check
scripts.conformance: npm run build && rdf-test-suite conformance/engine.cjs https://w3c.github.io/rdf-tests/sparql/sparql11/manifest-all.ttl -o summary -d 15000 --skip "(entailment|service|federat|/protocol/|http-rdf-update|agg-empty-group-count-graph|bindings/manifest#graph|constructwhere04|exists03|exists-graph-variable|property-path/manifest#pp34|property-path/manifest#pp35|subquery/manifest#subquery02)"
scripts.conformance:earl: npm run build && rdf-test-suite conformance/engine.cjs https://w3c.github.io/rdf-tests/sparql/sparql11/manifest-all.ttl -o earl -p conformance/earl-meta.json -d 15000 --skip "(entailment|service|federat|/protocol/|http-rdf-update|agg-empty-group-count-graph|bindings/manifest#graph|constructwhere04|exists03|exists-graph-variable|property-path/manifest#pp34|property-path/manifest#pp35|subquery/manifest#subquery02)" > conformance-earl.ttl
